summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of CastleAdmin Integrations tab functionality. Successfully verified all three sub-tabs (Connections, API Keys, Webhooks) with WooCommerce integration, field mapping, API management, and webhook configuration features.

integration_issues.issue: Occasional session timeouts during extended testing sessions - authentication state may need refresh

passed_tests: Integrations tab is present and accessible in Settings navigation
Three sub-tabs correctly implemented: Connections, API Keys, Webhooks
Connections sub-tab shows WooCommerce integration with shopping cart icon
Store URL field present with proper placeholder text
Consumer Key field with masked display and Show/Hide functionality
Consumer Secret field with masked display and Show/Hide functionality
Setup Instructions accordion with expand/collapse functionality
Field Mapping accordion with expand/collapse functionality
Test Connection button is present and clickable
Save Credentials button is present with proper styling
API Keys sub-tab accessible and functional
Webhooks sub-tab accessible and functional
Multiple integrations displayed (WooCommerce, Google Maps, SendGrid, Slack)
Proper status indicators for integration states
Professional UI styling consistent with application theme
Code implementation includes proper state management for all sub-tabs
WooCommerce field mapping functionality implemented
API key generation and management system implemented
Webhook configuration for incoming and outgoing webhooks implemented
Database integration with Supabase properly configured
Error handling and validation implemented in backend functions
